header.title: Design thinking
header.description: Use established Atmosphere guidance to understand problems, co-create solutions, and deliver measured outcomes across Boeing experiences.

sections.title: Understand the challenge
sections.description: Kick off new engagements with shared discovery, leverage existing research, and align on the problem statement before you ideate.

sections.title: Co-create and iterate
sections.description: Prototype in Figma, test with real users, and document experience decisions using Atmosphere foundations, styles, and components.

sections.title: Deliver and learn
sections.description: Partner with engineering, measure impact, and feed insights back into the backlog so the experience keeps improving.
